Family-wide re-confirmation that polymorphic {user|org} tenancy is settled canon — same underlying capability as ADR-0001, built by identity/E3-S1 + E3-S3; no separate build item needed since it only reconfirms an already-implemented decision

mcp/E4-S1 (TS verifier binding: multi-issuer JWKS → deny-by-default scope gate → principal) + E4-S3 (Token pass-through, no service credential = no shared-secret bridge) + E5-S2 (Raw in-process Kafka revocation consumer → deny-list apply) jointly implement 'MCP gateway cutover to identity-minted, edge-verified bearer tokens with push-revocation via Kafka, no bridge/shared-secret fallback'

lib/E1-S1 '[lib] pkg/auth: dual-IdP multi-issuer JWKS verify → canonical principal (+ cell-claim parse)' implements the cell/cell_epoch additive-claims-on-principal change this ADR records (covers FR-L1, NFR-L1)

identity/E5-S4 '[identity] Reconcile deprovisioner ownership (F2): retire CloudEvent worker, REST callee only' (covers FR-I15) — the open question is directly resolved by a titled story; feature-map.txt L315
